languages.text: {n}Однорукий рабочий выступает вперед, отодвигая одноглазого в сторону.{/n} "Да тут один паренек, солдат из пустотников, которому череп размозжило, недавно вернулся на нижние палубы после лечения. Так вот с {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}железной башкой{/d} он работает шибче прежнего! Так и нам бы, калекам, позволили хоть какие-то железяки вставлять, мы бы трудились лучше здоровых! День и ночь бы пахали на благо династии. Офицеры говорят — не положено, но вы ведь все можете, и запрет этот тоже снять! Будьте милосердны, Лорд-капитан!"

traits.locale_text: Ну нам очень понравились аугментации того челика

languages.text: {n}The one-armed worker steps forward, pushing the one-eyed man aside.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to the lower decks after treatment not long ago. With his new {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}metal head{/d}, he's working harder than ever! If they'd let us poor sods put some hardware in, we'd work even better than the healthy ones! We'd toil day and night for the good of the dynasty. The officers say it's not allowed, but you can do anything, even lift this ban! Be merciful, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: {n}Однорукий рабочий выступает вперед, отодвигая одноглазого в сторону.{/n} "Да тут один паренек, солдат из пустотников, которому череп размозжило, недавно вернулся на нижние палубы после лечения. languages.text: {n}片腕の労働者、片目だけの男を脇に押しやって前に出る。{/n}「治療を受けた後、頭蓋骨を潰された兵士が、最近下甲板に戻ってきた。新しい金属製の頭で、彼は今まで以上に働いている！もし、私たちが機械を装着させてもらえれば、健康な兵士よりももっと働ける！王朝のために、昼夜問わず働く！軍曹は禁止だと言うが、何でもできる！この禁止も解いてくれるだろう！慈悲深い艦長様！」
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker steps forward, pushing the one-eyed man aside.{/n} "One of the lads, a void trooper who got his skull crushed, came back to the lower decks after treatment not long ago. With his new metal head, he's working harder than ever! If they'd let us poor sods put some hardware in, we'd work even better than the healthy ones! We'd toil day and night for the good of the dynasty. The officers say it's not allowed, but you can do anything, even lift this ban! Be merciful, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: 片腕の労働者、片目だけの男を脇に押しやって前に出る。「治療を受けた後、頭蓋骨を潰された兵士が、最近下甲板に戻ってきた。新しい金属製の頭で、彼は今まで以上に働いている！もし、私たちが機械を装着させてもらえれば、健康な兵士よりももっと働ける！王朝のために、昼夜問わず働く！軍曹は禁止だと言うが、何でもできる！この禁止も解いてくれるだろう！慈悲深い艦長様！」

languages.text: {n}Tek kollu işçi, tek gözlü adamı kenara iterek öne çıkıyor.{/n} "Kafatası ezilmiş bir uçsuz eri, kısa bir süre önce tedaviden sonra alt güvertelere döndü. Yeni {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}metal kafası{/d} sayesinde her zamankinden daha çok çalışıyor! Biz zavallılara biraz donanım takılmasına izin verselerdi sağlıklı olanlardan bile daha sıkı çalışırdık! Hanedanlığın iyiliği için gece gündüz çalışırdık. Subaylar buna izin verilmediğini söylüyor ama siz her şeyi yapabilirsiniz, hatta bu yasağı bile kaldırabilirsiniz! Merhamet edin Lord Kaptan!"
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker steps forward, pushing the one-eyed man aside.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to the lower decks after treatment not long ago. With his new {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}metal head{/d}, he's working harder than ever! If they'd let us poor sods put some hardware in, we'd work even better than the healthy ones! We'd toil day and night for the good of the dynasty. The officers say it's not allowed, but you can do anything, even lift this ban! Be merciful, Lord Captain!"

Subaylar buna izin verilmediğini söylüyor ama siz her şeyi yapabilirsiniz, hatta bu yasağı bile kaldırabilirsiniz! Merhamet edin Lord Kaptan!"

languages.text: {n}El trabajador manco da un paso adelante, apartando a un lado al tuerto.{/n} «Uno de los muchachos, un soldado del vacío al que habían destrozado el cráneo, volvió a las cubiertas inferiores no hace mucho. ¡Con su nueva {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}cabeza de metal{/d}, está trabajando más duro que nunca! Si permitiera que los menos afortunados tuviéramos esos aumentos, ¡trabajaríamos aún mejor que los sanos! Nos esforzaríamos día y noche por el bien de la dinastía. Los oficiales dicen que no está permitido, pero ¡usted puede hacerlo todo, incluso levantar esa prohibición! ¡Tenga piedad, Lord Capitán!».
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker steps forward, pushing the one-eyed man aside.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to the lower decks after treatment not long ago. With his new {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}metal head{/d}, he's working harder than ever! If they'd let us poor sods put some hardware in, we'd work even better than the healthy ones! We'd toil day and night for the good of the dynasty. The officers say it's not allowed, but you can do anything, even lift this ban! Be merciful, Lord Captain!"

Si permitiera que los menos afortunados tuviéramos esos aumentos, ¡trabajaríamos aún mejor que los sanos! Nos esforzaríamos día y noche por el bien de la dinastía. Los oficiales dicen que no está permitido, pero ¡usted puede hacerlo todo, incluso levantar esa prohibición! ¡Tenga piedad, Lord Capitán!».

languages.text: {n}独臂工人推开独眼男子，走上前来。{/n}“我们有个伙计，是个头骨被压碎了的舰船士兵。不久前他治疗完，顶着颗新换的{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}金属脑袋{/d}回到了下层甲板。他干起活来比以前带劲多了！要是让我们这些可怜人也装上点硬家伙，我们干得准比那些健全人还要好！我们一定会为了王朝从白天干到晚上。军官们说那样做违反规定，但您无所不能，您能废除这道禁令！发发慈悲吧，舰长大人！”
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker steps forward, pushing the one-eyed man aside.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to the lower decks after treatment not long ago. With his new {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}metal head{/d}, he's working harder than ever! If they'd let us poor sods put some hardware in, we'd work even better than the healthy ones! We'd toil day and night for the good of the dynasty. The officers say it's not allowed, but you can do anything, even lift this ban! Be merciful, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: {n}Le manchot pousse le borgne sur le côté pour s'avancer vers vous.{/n} « L'un des gars, un cosmomarin qui s'est fait défoncer le crâne, est revenu sur les ponts inférieurs il y a quelque temps après avoir été soigné. Avec sa nouvelle {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}tête de métal{/d}, il travaille plus dur que jamais ! Si les éclopés comme nous avaient le droit de porter des augmentations, on serait encore plus efficaces que les valides ! On trimerait jour et nuit au service de la dynastie. Les officiers disent que ce n'est pas permis, mais il tient qu'à vous de lever cette interdiction ! On implore votre pitié, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker steps forward, pushing the one-eyed man aside.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to the lower decks after treatment not long ago. With his new {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}metal head{/d}, he's working harder than ever! If they'd let us poor sods put some hardware in, we'd work even better than the healthy ones! We'd toil day and night for the good of the dynasty. The officers say it's not allowed, but you can do anything, even lift this ban! Be merciful, Lord Captain!"

Avec sa nouvelle {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}tête de métal{/d}, il travaille plus dur que jamais ! Si les éclopés comme nous avaient le droit de porter des augmentations, on serait encore plus efficaces que les valides ! On trimerait jour et nuit au service de la dynastie. Les officiers disent que ce n'est pas permis, mais il tient qu'à vous de lever cette interdiction ! On implore votre pitié, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »

languages.text: {n}Der einarmige Arbeiter tritt vor und schiebt den Einäugigen zur Seite.{/n} "Einer der Jungs, ein Raumfahrer mit eingeschlagenem Schädel, kehrte kürzlich nach seiner Behandlung auf die unteren Decks zurück. Mit seinem neuen {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_FirstChoiceVivisector}Metallkopf{/d} arbeitet er härter denn je! Wenn wir armen Seelen ein wenig Hardware bekämen, würden wir noch besser arbeiten als die Gesunden! Tag und Nacht, zum Wohle der Dynastie. Die Offiziere sagen, das sei verboten, aber Ihr könnt alles, auch dieses Verbot, aufheben! Seid gnädig, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: {n}The one-armed worker steps forward, pushing the one-eyed man aside.{/n} "One of the lads, a voidsman soldier who got his skull crushed, came back to the lower decks after treatment not long ago. We'd toil day and night for the good of the dynasty. The officers say it's not allowed, but you can do anything, even lift this ban! Be merciful, Lord Captain!"
